name: Butter Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cracker crumbs, 1/3 cup sugar, butter, and 1/2 cup pecans in a bowl; mix well.
2. Reserve 1/3 cup of the mixture. Press the remaining mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In another large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Gradually add 1-1/2 cups sugar, mixing well.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in sour cream and flavorings.
5. Stir in the remaining chopped pecans.
6. Pour the filling into the prepared pan and sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture.
7. Bake at 475°F (245°C) for 10 minutes. Reduce temperature to 300°F (150°C) and bake an additional 50 minutes, or until set.
8. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack before refrigerating.
Yields one 9-inch cheesecake.
